seoTitle: How to Enable Google Pay on Your Gumroad Checkout
metaDescription: Learn how Gumroad automatically displays Google Pay to eligible buyers and how to confirm your checkout is set up to support it.
intro: Google Pay can appear automatically as a checkout option for eligible buyers on Gumroad, without requiring complex setup on your end. This guide explains how that mobile wallet support works, what to check in your account settings, and how to confirm it's showing up correctly.

steps.heading: Open your payments settings
steps.body: Go to your Gumroad settings and review your base account and payout configuration.

steps.heading: Confirm your regional eligibility
steps.body: Check that your account's country and currency settings support Google Pay at checkout.

steps.heading: Understand automatic wallet routing
steps.body: Gumroad's checkout system automatically displays Google Pay to compatible buyers, so no manual toggle is usually needed.

steps.heading: Preview your product checkout
steps.body: Visit your live product page from a supported browser or mobile device to see how the payment interface appears.

steps.heading: Test the checkout flow
steps.body: Run a test transaction if possible to confirm mobile wallet buttons display correctly.

faq.question: Do I need to manually enable Google Pay on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Gumroad's checkout automatically handles mobile wallet options like Google Pay for eligible buyers, so there's typically no manual toggle.

faq.question: Why don't I see the Google Pay button on my product page?
faq.answer: It usually depends on the buyer's browser and device compatibility, so it may not appear in every situation.

faq.question: Does Google Pay cost extra to offer as a seller?
faq.answer: It's generally included as part of Gumroad's standard checkout system rather than a separate paid feature.

faq.question: Can buyers use Google Pay on both desktop and mobile?
faq.answer: Support depends on the buyer's browser and device, with mobile and Chrome-based checkouts being the most common.
